BomItem.description: Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated
Three-terminal, low power, high voltage regulator implemented in CMOS technology
Switched-Capacitor Voltage Converter, 1.5V to 10.0V operating supply voltage, 10mA with a 0.5V output drop, SO-8/DIP-8/µMAX-8/TO-99
Dual-channel low input bias current standard op amp
